objective: Develop a fixed-PVRIG sequence-to-computational-dual-docking surrogate for optional docking-budget allocation without upgrading computational geometry to biological truth.
claim_boundary: V4-C predicts computational dual-conformation docking geometry and uncertainty only. It is not a PVRIG binding probability, affinity/Kd predictor, competition assay result, experimental blocker label, Docking Gold release, or formal biological model.

v1_3.allowed_use: diagnostic continuous geometry and measurement-variance analysis only
v1_3.forbidden_use: training labels, Docking Gold, or retrospective threshold repair

minimum_future_requirements: at least 3 families unseen by the previous development method
a new prospectively frozen family-level formal holdout
experimental binding and blocking evidence kept separate from docking geometry

remote_controls.training_policy: measurement calibration and evaluator stability only; never counted as independent candidate or biological family

teacher500.policy: lower-fidelity same-domain transfer diagnostic only; never a V4-C formal test

full_qc_complete290.policy: developability and portfolio evidence only; not docking geometry supervision

selection_fields: selection_bucket from the pre-existing V2 panel
split_contract.open_development_policy: nested near-CDR3-family grouped cross-validation; all architecture and weight selection uses open rows only
split_contract.challenge_policy: descriptive one-shot challenge after the development configuration is frozen; challenge results may not trigger further changes in this version
split_contract.future_formal_policy: Any formal promotion requires a new version and a new prospectively frozen panel that has no labels at split-freeze time.
known_limitations: shared backbone groups and arms across split
near full-sequence neighbors may remain across split

teacher_release_gate.raw_result_policy: Open only the result JSON files for the 96 preselected OPEN_DEVELOPMENT candidate IDs; do not compute challenge labels in the open release path.
teacher_release_gate.failed_job_policy: A candidate-conformation remains eligible only when at least two other seeds pass all evidence gates; missing seed increases uncertainty and is never imputed as success.

continuous_teacher_definition.pose_rank: sort complete native/cross model pairs by finite ascending HADDOCK score within each job
continuous_teacher_definition.pvrl2_clash_policy: Report separately but do not penalize because the virtual PVRL2 overlap is part of the obstruction geometry endpoint.
continuous_teacher_definition.receptor_score: median job_score over successful seeds for that docking conformation
continuous_teacher_definition.tier_policy: Legacy A/B/C/E and derived G distributions are diagnostic explanation only and never the sole or primary training target.

excluded_from_v1_gate.frozen_v2_3_contact_statistics: not implemented in the V4-C v1 baseline runner; research-only until a separately frozen feature extractor exists

group_null.unit: near-CDR3-family mean permutation with within-family residuals preserved

implemented_baseline_contract.architecture_change_policy: All architecture decisions use open development only. Once the retrospective challenge is read, this version is closed; any further architecture requires a new version and new challenge/formal panel.

development_decision.strongest_baseline: maximum nested-grouped-CV Spearman over constant, scaffold-only, metadata-shortcut, CDR3-only, full-sequence ridge, and generic-prior-only when available
development_decision.challenge_role: descriptive robustness check only; not a formal promotion gate

sequence_support_features.full_sequence: SHA256-hashed 3-mer frequency vector, width 256, cosine distance

ood_and_transfer_contract.threshold_fit: 95th percentile of leave-one-near-CDR3-family-out nearest-neighbor distance among OPEN_DEVELOPMENT rows, separately for full sequence and CDR3
ood_and_transfer_contract.in_support_rule: both distances are at or below their frozen open-development thresholds

uncertainty_gate.definition: three-model prediction standard deviation plus nearest-support distance
uncertainty_gate.selective_risk_requirement: removing the highest-uncertainty 25 percent must reduce open nested-CV MAE by at least 10 percent
uncertainty_gate.error_separation_requirement: highest-uncertainty quartile MAE must be at least 1.25 times lowest-uncertainty quartile MAE

competition_allocation_policy.deadline_fallback: v3_full weak prior plus Full QC plus diversity plus real docking; V4-C research may continue but cannot block Top50
competition_allocation_policy.final_submission_authority: fresh real docking plus QC, developability, binding prior, manual pose review, and portfolio diversity
